name: Sub-Jee
recipeIngredient: Cauliflower head (1 small), cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add mushrooms and sauté until they release their juices and begin to brown.
3. Stir in cauliflower, potatoes, onion, celery, jalapeno, cilantro, cumin, curry powder, garlic, salt, coriander, cayenne pepper, cinnamon, and chicken broth.
4. Cover the pot and braise the mixture over medium heat for about 20 to 30 minutes, or until the vegetables are very tender.
5. To serve, heat flour tortillas one at a time in a dry skillet until they are soft and pliable, turning once. Sprinkle with a little grated cheese and keep the tortilla in the pan until the cheese begins to melt.
6. Spoon some of the vegetable mixture down the center of each tortilla, top with diced fresh tomatoes, and add a dollop of sour cream.
7. Roll up the tortillas around the filling, burrito fashion.
Note: When preparing fresh chilies, wear rubber gloves for protection against oils that can cause burning sensation on skin.
